Name: Pallet
cfg.show_pallet_connected_popup.name: Show Pallet Connected Popup
cfg.show_pallet_connected_popup.desc: Show a small 'Linked to elevator' message above any pallet you build in the cellar.
cfg.auto_route_loose_crates.name: Auto-Route Loose Crates
cfg.auto_route_loose_crates.desc: On game load, slide any loose crate onto the nearest pallet with space. Leftovers go to the cellar elevator.
cfg.auto_route_carried_crates.name: Auto-Route Carried Crates
cfg.auto_route_carried_crates.desc: When you drop a carried crate, send it to the nearest pallet with space. Leftovers go to the cellar elevator.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose pallet-and-zone diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
